# pocketid_ldap_sync (Resource)

Triggers an LDAP synchronization in Pocket-ID. This resource is useful for forcing a sync after LDAP configuration changes or on a schedule.

-> **Note** This resource triggers a sync operation when created or when its triggers change. The sync operation itself is performed by Pocket-ID asynchronously.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Trigger sync when LDAP configuration changes
resource "pocketid_ldap_config" "main" {
  enabled = true

  url           = "ldap://ldap.example.com:389"
  bind_dn       = "cn=admin,dc=example,dc=com"
  bind_password = var.ldap_password
  base_dn       = "dc=example,dc=com"

  user_attributes {
    unique_identifier = "uid"
    username          = "uid"
    email             = "mail"
  }
}

resource "pocketid_ldap_sync" "on_config_change" {
  triggers = {
    # Sync whenever the LDAP configuration changes
    config_id = pocketid_ldap_config.main.id

    # You can also trigger based on specific config attributes
    ldap_url  = pocketid_ldap_config.main.url
    base_dn   = pocketid_ldap_config.main.base_dn
  }
}

# Force a sync using timestamp trigger
resource "pocketid_ldap_sync" "daily_sync" {
  triggers = {
    # Change this value to force a new sync
    last_sync = "2024-01-15-v1"
  }
}

# Sync when user group configuration changes
resource "pocketid_group" "ldap_admins" {
  name          = "ldap-admins"
  friendly_name = "LDAP Administrators"
}

resource "pocketid_ldap_sync" "on_group_change" {
  triggers = {
    # Sync when admin group is created or modified
    admin_group = pocketid_group.ldap_admins.id
  }
}

# Multiple triggers example
resource "pocketid_ldap_sync" "multi_trigger" {
  triggers = {
    # Combines multiple conditions that would trigger a sync
    config_version = "v2"
    ldap_enabled   = pocketid_ldap_config.main.enabled
    environment    = var.environment
    force_sync     = var.force_ldap_sync
  }
}

# Conditional sync based on test results
data "pocketid_ldap_test" "connection_test" {}

resource "pocketid_ldap_sync" "conditional" {
  # Only create (and sync) if LDAP test is successful
  count = data.pocketid_ldap_test.connection_test.connection_successful ? 1 : 0

  triggers = {
    test_result = data.pocketid_ldap_test.connection_test.connection_successful
  }
}

# Handle sync results
resource "pocketid_ldap_sync" "with_output" {
  triggers = {
    timestamp = timestamp()
  }
}

output "sync_status" {
  value = pocketid_ldap_sync.with_output.sync_status
}

output "sync_error" {
  value = pocketid_ldap_sync.with_output.error_message

  # Only show if there's an error
  precondition {
    condition     = pocketid_ldap_sync.with_output.sync_status == "success" || pocketid_ldap_sync.with_output.sync_status == ""
    error_message = "LDAP sync failed: ${pocketid_ldap_sync.with_output.error_message}"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `triggers` (Map of String) Map of values which, when changed, will trigger a new LDAP sync. To force a sync, update any value in this map.

### Read-Only

- `error_message` (String) Error message if the sync operation failed.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier for this sync operation.
- `last_sync_time` (String) Timestamp of when this sync was triggered.
- `sync_status` (String) Status of the sync operation (success or error).

## Import

This resource does not support import as sync operations are one-time actions.
